q: Why is my team not executing on the board-approved strategy?
diagnostic: The Prime Visionary agent would say: your strategy lives in a slide deck and your execution lives in Jira. The gap between the two is the 'integrity gap' — and it widens with every hire who has never read the original vision.
answer: The Prime Visionary agent would say: your strategy lives in a slide deck and your execution lives in Jira. The gap between the two is the 'integrity gap' — and it widens with every hire who has never read the original vision.
description: Intent–action gap — the board agrees on strategy, but engineering and sales execute something completely different.
symptom: Shadow projects discovered months in. Sales promises features engineering deprecated. Resources wasted on conflicting roadmaps.
